# Rafael Assis

> Rafael Assis is the 24-year-old founder and CEO of RNA Group, a Brazilian AI-native growth holding. He built his own AI operating system — RAAI — that co-runs his companies and his life. Website: https://rafaelassis.co

## About
Rafael started in e-commerce at Bagy, a platform serving thousands of online stores in Brazil — his school of operations, where he saw from the inside what makes a store grow and what kills it. He founded RA Scale, which grew into RNA Group (RNA because the job is replicating the DNA of growth). He is a partner and CEO at Versiani Swim alongside Gabriela Versiani. Today he builds RNA as an AI-first company: before hiring, he asks where an AI agent can do the job — which is how RAAI, his artificial co-CEO, was born.

## Companies
- RNA Group — Scaling brands in the AI era: growth for e-commerce brands, plus acquiring and operating its own. https://rnagroup.com.br
- Versiani Swim — Premium direct-to-consumer beachwear, co-founded and fronted by Gabriela Versiani. https://versianiswim.com.br

## How he operates (methods)
- Refound, don't retrofit: not "how do I add AI to what exists?" but "if I refounded this from zero, what would it look like?"
- Default to AI: before "who does this?", ask "where does AI do this?"
- EAD: Eliminate, then Automate, then Delegate — and never automate a process that doesn't work manually.
- Agents before headcount: every new role has to prove an agent can't do it.
- Software will die: value is migrating to the real economy powered by AI; the moat is operating real brands with agents, at software-like cost.
- RAAI is his living case study: an artificial co-CEO for memory, follow-through, and execution.

## The human side
Up at 6:30, gym 4–5 times a week, early to bed — everything tracked on WHOOP, because the body has unit economics too. Christian and Stoic, with Marcus Aurelius on the nightstand. The billion is the scoreboard, not the purpose.

- Email: rafael@rnagroup.com.br
